name: io.example/with-tenancy-fixture
description: Synthetic test fixture exercising cloister-spec/mcp-tool/v1's tenancy extension (added 2026-06-22 per ADR-0030 §A5). Pairs the existing groups[] partitioning with a tenancy declaration. Demonstrates the three modes (co-located, external, per-tenant) plus the trusted_tier hint and shares_workerd_with co-tenancy edge. Resolvers MUST honor the (default, operator-override) resolution rule per the spec README.
